name: UBA : Possible TGT PAC Forgery
notes: This Rule Detects use of Forged PAC certificate to get a Service Ticket from Kerberos TGS.
bb_references: BB:UBA : TGT PAC Forgery Patched Server
BB:UBA : TGT PAC Forgery Unpatched Server
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : TGT PAC Forgery Patched Server, BB:UBA : TGT PAC Forgery Unpatched Server
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Possible TGT PAC Forgery on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : TGT PAC Forgery Patched Server, BB:UBA : TGT PAC Forgery Unpatched Server
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Possible TGT PAC Forgery
